title: Additional Jewelry
description: Jewelry Add-On for the More RPG Classes Mods.
body:
![Title](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/rULzJh3O/images/db5b7429f6aff5540d00b975fc194f15a81b3c73.png)
# 💍Additional RPG Jewelry

[![Fabric](https://img.shields.io/badge/loader-fabric-black?style=for-the-badge&labelColor=black&color=grey)](https://fabricmc.net/)
[![Curseforge](https://img.shields.io/badge/curseforge-black?style=for-the-badge&logo=curseforge&labelColor=black&color=grey)](https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/additional-rpg-jewelry)
[![Discord](https://img.shields.io/discord/1209063880790376468?style=for-the-badge&logo=discord&label=discord&labelColor=black&color=grey)](https://discord.com/invite/AShKd5XrTu)
[![KoFi](https://img.shields.io/badge/donations-black?style=for-the-badge&logo=kofi&labelColor=black&color=grey)](https://ko-fi.com/fichteee)
[![Github](https://img.shields.io/badge/github-black?style=for-the-badge&logo=github&labelColor=black&color=grey)](https://github.com/ProfessorFichte/Additional-RPG-Jewelry)

## 📂 Installation
### **🚨Required Mods**
- [More RPG Library](https://modrinth.com/mod/more-rpg-classes 'Title')
- [Jewelry](https://modrinth.com/mod/jewelry)

### **👍Highly Recommended Mods**
- [My More RPG Classes Mods](https://modrinth.com/user/Fichte 'Title')
- [The whole RPG Series Project!](https://modrinth.com/user/ZsoltMolnarrr 'Title')

---
## 🕹️ Features
- Collect additional Jewelry, exclusivly created for the More RPG Classes Series
- Craft some Jewelry with vanilla materials and gems from the Jewelry Mod
- You can find these gems by mining, on the same levels like diamond ore
- Find the Jewelry in dungeon chests
- Benefit from the attributes by equipping the Jewelry

**Configuration**
- Jewelry bonuses:
- config/additional_rpg_jewelry/items.json
- Loot Injections:
- config/rpg_series/loot.json
---
